## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss and organize tasks related to investor outreach and calendar management for upcoming fundraising efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/k16se-zbUhg-9TPw-Kz1MJCs4DHzsgMy?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Calendar clearing and rescheduling needed to prioritize investor meetings next week](https://fathom.video/share/k16se-zbUhg-9TPw-Kz1MJCs4DHzsgMy?tab=summary&timestamp=643.0)
  - [Task to update investor database in Notion with LinkedIn profiles, roles, and Marcel's comments](https://fathom.video/share/k16se-zbUhg-9TPw-Kz1MJCs4DHzsgMy?tab=summary&timestamp=910.0)
  - [George and Dignory both feeling under the weather, possibly due to a widespread virus](https://fathom.video/share/k16se-zbUhg-9TPw-Kz1MJCs4DHzsgMy?tab=summary&timestamp=18.0)

## Topics

### Health Check-in

  - [Both George and Dignory reported feeling sick](https://fathom.video/share/k16se-zbUhg-9TPw-Kz1MJCs4DHzsgMy?tab=summary&timestamp=18.0)
  - [Speculation about a widespread virus affecting many people](https://fathom.video/share/k16se-zbUhg-9TPw-Kz1MJCs4DHzsgMy?tab=summary&timestamp=32.0)

### Calendar Management

  - [Clearing and rescheduling meetings to accommodate investor meetings next week](https://fathom.video/share/k16se-zbUhg-9TPw-Kz1MJCs4DHzsgMy?tab=summary&timestamp=643.0)
  - [Prioritizing VC meetings over other appointments](https://fathom.video/share/k16se-zbUhg-9TPw-Kz1MJCs4DHzsgMy?tab=summary&timestamp=809.0)
  - [Extending certain meetings to 1 hour where possible](https://fathom.video/share/k16se-zbUhg-9TPw-Kz1MJCs4DHzsgMy?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)
  - [Keeping 30-minute sales call if possible, but willing to move if conflicts arise](https://fathom.video/share/k16se-zbUhg-9TPw-Kz1MJCs4DHzsgMy?tab=summary&timestamp=800.0)
  - [Plan to send message about high investor demand to justify schedule changes](https://fathom.video/share/k16se-zbUhg-9TPw-Kz1MJCs4DHzsgMy?tab=summary&timestamp=755.0)

### Investor Database Update

  - [Task to update Notion database with investor information](https://fathom.video/share/k16se-zbUhg-9TPw-Kz1MJCs4DHzsgMy?tab=summary&timestamp=910.0)
  - [Adding LinkedIn profiles for each investor](https://fathom.video/share/k16se-zbUhg-9TPw-Kz1MJCs4DHzsgMy?tab=summary&timestamp=922.0)
  - [Including roles of each person](https://fathom.video/share/k16se-zbUhg-9TPw-Kz1MJCs4DHzsgMy?tab=summary&timestamp=1197.0)
  - [Incorporating Marcel's comments and priorities (e.g., Ethan Choi as super high priority)](https://fathom.video/share/k16se-zbUhg-9TPw-Kz1MJCs4DHzsgMy?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Moving investors between "top group" and "shortlisted" based on Marcel's feedback](https://fathom.video/share/k16se-zbUhg-9TPw-Kz1MJCs4DHzsgMy?tab=summary&timestamp=1124.0)
  - [Estimated time for LinkedIn updates: 20-30 minutes](https://fathom.video/share/k16se-zbUhg-9TPw-Kz1MJCs4DHzsgMy?tab=summary&timestamp=1175.0)

### Workflow and Tools
